notes: Form 8829 AcroForm widget map for the IRS-hosted TY2025 PDF (PDF /Title metadata: '2025 Form 8829').

TY2025 Form 8829 is a single-page form (all 44 line widgets on page 1) grouped into Parts I-IV: Part I = lines 1-7 (business-use percentage), Part II = lines 8-36 (allowable deduction with direct/indirect columns), Part III = lines 37-42 (depreciation of home), Part IV = lines 43-44 (carryover).
Two-column expenses (direct vs indirect) live inside named sub-forms: Table_Lines9-12 (lines 9-12) and Table_Lines16-23 (lines 16-23). Each row has two widgets: (a) direct / (b) indirect.

One Form 8829 is filed per home office per Schedule C business. Multi-business dispatch in Layer 2 produces ONE filled PDF per Schedule C with home_office.method == 'regular'. Simplified method skips Form 8829 entirely and reports directly on Sch C line 30.
Header SSN widget (f1_02) is filled by the Form 1040 header, not by the renderer, matching the Schedule C/SE convention.

proprietor_ssn.note: SSN — header. Filled by Form 1040 header, not by this renderer.

line_1_business_area.note: Part I line 1 — area (sq ft) used regularly and exclusively for business.

line_2_total_home_area.note: Part I line 2 — total area of home (sq ft).

line_3_area_percentage.note: Part I line 3 — line 1 / line 2 as a percentage.

line_4_daycare_hours.note: Part I line 4 — daycare hours (daycare-facility special case). Blank for non-daycare.

line_5_total_hours.note: Part I line 5 — total hours in year (8,760 for full-year daycare).

line_6_daycare_decimal.note: Part I line 6 — line 4 / line 5 as a decimal.

line_7_business_percentage.note: Part I line 7 — final business percentage applied to indirect expenses.

line_8_sch_c_line_29_tentative_profit.note: Part II line 8 — Schedule C line 29 plus/minus adjustments; the gross-income limitation cap.

line_9a_casualty_direct.note: Part II line 9 (a) direct — casualty losses.

line_9b_casualty_indirect.note: Part II line 9 (b) indirect — casualty losses.

line_10a_mortgage_interest_direct.note: Part II line 10 (a) direct — deductible mortgage interest.

line_10b_mortgage_interest_indirect.note: Part II line 10 (b) indirect — deductible mortgage interest (subject to Schedule A limit).

line_11a_real_estate_taxes_direct.note: Part II line 11 (a) direct — real estate taxes.

line_11b_real_estate_taxes_indirect.note: Part II line 11 (b) indirect — real estate taxes.

line_12a_sum_9_10_11_direct.note: Part II line 12 (a) direct — sum of lines 9a, 10a, 11a.

line_12b_sum_9_10_11_indirect.note: Part II line 12 (b) indirect — sum of lines 9b, 10b, 11b.

line_13_line_12b_times_line_7.note: Part II line 13 — line 12b (indirect) × line 7 (business percentage).

line_14_sum_12a_plus_13.note: Part II line 14 — direct casualty/interest/taxes plus apportioned indirect.

line_15_subtract_14_from_8.note: Part II line 15 — line 8 minus line 14 (remaining gross-income cap for operating expenses / depreciation).

line_16a_excess_mortgage_interest_direct.note: Part II line 16 (a) direct — excess mortgage interest.

line_16b_excess_mortgage_interest_indire.note: Part II line 16 (b) indirect — excess mortgage interest.

line_17a_excess_real_estate_taxes_direct.note: Part II line 17 (a) direct — excess real estate taxes.

line_17b_excess_real_estate_taxes_indire.note: Part II line 17 (b) indirect — excess real estate taxes.

line_19b_rent_indirect.note: Part II line 19 (b) indirect — rent (if renting; applied via business percentage).

line_20a_repairs_direct.note: Part II line 20 (a) direct — repairs and maintenance.

line_20b_repairs_indirect.note: Part II line 20 (b) indirect — repairs and maintenance.

line_22a_other_expenses_direct.note: Part II line 22 (a) direct — other expenses.

line_22b_other_expenses_indirect.note: Part II line 22 (b) indirect — other expenses.

line_23a_sum_16_through_22_direct.note: Part II line 23 (a) direct — sum of lines 16a-22a.

line_23b_sum_16_through_22_indirect.note: Part II line 23 (b) indirect — sum of lines 16b-22b.

line_24_line_23b_times_line_7.note: Part II line 24 — line 23b × line 7 (apportioned indirect operating expenses).

line_25_carryover_prior_year_operating.note: Part II line 25 — carryover of prior year operating expenses.

line_26_sum_23a_24_25.note: Part II line 26 — sum of line 23a, line 24, and line 25 (total operating expenses with carryover).

line_27_allowable_operating_expenses.note: Part II line 27 — allowable operating expenses = min(line 15, line 26).

line_28_limit_on_excess_casualty_depreci.note: Part II line 28 — line 15 minus line 27 (remaining cap for casualty/depreciation).

line_29_excess_casualty_losses.note: Part II line 29 — excess casualty losses.

line_30_depreciation_of_home.note: Part II line 30 — depreciation of home (from Part III line 42 below).

line_31_carryover_prior_year_excess_casu.note: Part II line 31 — carryover of prior year excess casualty losses and depreciation.

line_32_sum_29_30_31.note: Part II line 32 — sum of lines 29, 30, 31.

line_34_sum_14_27_33.note: Part II line 34 — sum of lines 14, 27, 33.

line_35_casualty_loss_portion_to_4684.note: Part II line 35 — casualty loss portion carried to Form 4684.

line_36_allowable_expenses_to_sch_c_line.note: Part II line 36 — line 34 minus line 35. Flows to Schedule C line 30.

line_37_smaller_of_basis_or_fmv.note: Part III line 37 — smaller of home's adjusted basis or FMV.

line_38_value_of_land.note: Part III line 38 — land value included on line 37 (excluded from depreciation).

line_39_basis_of_building.note: Part III line 39 — line 37 minus line 38.

line_40_business_basis_of_building.note: Part III line 40 — line 39 × line 7 (business percentage of building basis).

line_41_depreciation_percentage.note: Part III line 41 — depreciation percentage (39-year nonresidential real property; mid-month convention in first/last year). Steady-state 2.564%.

line_42_depreciation_allowable.note: Part III line 42 — line 40 × line 41. Flows to Part II line 30.

line_43_carryover_operating_expenses.note: Part IV line 43 — operating expense carryover to next year (line 26 minus line 27).

line_44_carryover_excess_casualty_deprec.note: Part IV line 44 — excess casualty/depreciation carryover (line 32 minus line 33).
